title:
Upgraded  $BLAST ↔️ $BLST On Friday 

This Friday, we will launch $BLST in partnership with @mintclu

audit.reason: The proposal provides a clear plan for upgrading the $BLAST token, detailing the issues with the initial launch and the changes being made. It also outlines the benefits of the new approach, such as reduced supply, improved reward structure, and broader liquidity on Uniswap.
audit.improvements: Consider adding more details on the marketing strategy and how it will enhance visibility and engagement. Additionally, providing a timeline for these changes and how they will be implemented could strengthen the proposal.
